user.title: Connect to LocalSky
user.description: Enter the host (IP or hostname) of your LocalSky instance. Default port is {default_port}.

data.use_https: Use HTTPS (only if you front LocalSky with a TLS reverse proxy)

auth.title: LocalSky API token
auth.description: This LocalSky at {host} requires sign-in. In LocalSky, open Settings, then Account, create an API token (for example named home-assistant), and paste it here.

zeroconf_confirm.title: LocalSky found
zeroconf_confirm.description: Add LocalSky {version} at {host} to Home Assistant?

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to LocalSky
reauth_confirm.description: LocalSky at {host} rejected the saved API token (revoked, or login was just enabled). Create a fresh token in LocalSky under Settings, then Account, and paste it here.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach LocalSky at that host and port.
error.not_localsky: The endpoint responded but is not a LocalSky instance.
error.service_too_old: LocalSky reported a service version older than this integration supports. Update LocalSky to a recent release and try again.
error.api_too_old: LocalSky reported an API version this integration cannot speak. Update LocalSky to a recent release and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error connecting to LocalSky. Check the host, port, and that LocalSky is reachable from Home Assistant.

abort.already_configured: This LocalSky instance is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the discovered LocalSky instance.
abort.not_localsky: The discovered endpoint is not a compatible LocalSky instance.

init.title: LocalSky options
init.description: Tune how this integration talks to LocalSky.

data.use_sse: Use Server-Sent Events (push updates from LocalSky)
data.poll_interval_seconds: Polling interval (seconds) — used only when SSE is disabled

run_zone.name: Run zone
run_zone.description: Run a single irrigation zone for a fixed duration.

zone.name: Zone slug
zone.description: The zone identifier as configured in LocalSky.

seconds.name: Duration (seconds)
seconds.description: How long to run, in seconds.

entry_id.name: LocalSky entry
entry_id.description: Optional. Target a specific LocalSky deployment.

stop_zone.name: Stop zone
stop_zone.description: Stop a single irrigation zone immediately.

stop_all.name: Stop all zones
stop_all.description: Stop every running irrigation zone immediately.

pause.name: Pause irrigation
pause.description: Pause the irrigation engine until N hours from now.

hours.name: Pause duration (hours)
hours.description: How long to pause, in hours. Default 24.

resume.name: Resume irrigation
resume.description: Clear an active pause so the engine resumes normal operation.
